{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archstone
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Archstone Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Archstone is a smoky, scripted crystal artifact that functions by siphoning power from its surroundings. It possesses a hunger that can be felt by those nearby, drawing [[madra]] from targets to fuel its effects. When activated, it can significantly augment the power of a spirit, such as an [[Underlord's Remnant]], though its use carries extreme risks. If a wielder attempts to draw too much power without regard for their own safety, the artifact can erode the foundation of their soul and potentially shatter their core. Historically, the Archstone was retrieved from a deep western labyrinth by [[Jai Daishou]], an act that violated imperial commands and endangered the realm by potentially attracting [[Dreadgods]]. While it is considered one of the weaker objects found within the [[labyrinth]], it remains a potent tool. The stone can be stored within a person's [[soulspace]], appearing as a clear white object floating among their madra channels. It can also be used to reinforce physical augmentations; for instance, [[Lindon]] utilized the stone's power to strengthen a [[binding]] technique in his arm, though the process caused the crystal to shatter.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Archstone is a [[Lord]] treasure in the form of a crystal ball that was retrieved from a western labyrinth by [[Jai Daishou]]. This powerful artifact serves as one of the options available to him after its acquisition from the storehouse. Capable of siphoning immense amounts of power, the stone can draw [[madra]] from every person present in a room. Furthermore, its use causes the surrounding world to appear gray and lifeless.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The crystal ball obtained from the storehouse is called an [[Archstone]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] is an option left for [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] is an artifact that can draw [[madra]] from people in a room.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] can make the world appear gray and lifeless.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] is capable of siphoning much power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] is related to a crystal ball.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] is a [[Lord]] treasure found within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Archstone]] was retrieved from a western labyrinth by [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Archstone]] is a potent weapon stolen from an ancient, cursed [[labyrinth]] and confiscated from a traitor to the [[Empire]]'s leadership.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Archstone]] is kept in [[the Emperor]]'s personal [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] produced a smoky orb known as the [[Archstone]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Archstone]] is used to reinforce [[Lindon]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] absorbed the power of the [[Archstone]] when he advanced to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[binding]] in [[Lindon]]'s arm was altered by the addition of the [[Archstone]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
